title: ResultGenerator has no overload for a custom ResultCode with message
body: genFailResult(String message) always sets ResultCode.FAIL; there's no overload to return a different specific ResultCode alongside a custom message without manually constructing a Result.

title: MybatisConfigurer hardcodes the pagination dialect
body: MybatisConfigurer.java configures the PageHelper interceptor with a fixed dialect property, so adapting this seed project to a different supported database means editing this class instead of it being externally configurable.

title: ServiceException doesn't carry a ResultCode
body: ServiceException only wraps a message string, so code that catches it and maps it to a Result always falls back to the generic FAIL code, even when a more specific ResultCode would better describe the failure.

title: AbstractService usage isn't documented with an example
body: core/AbstractService.java is the base class every service extends, but there's no example showing how Mapper and Service tie together when adding a new entity to the seed.
